drl:
rule "R0"
salience 6
when
    accumulate( T3(f1 in (false, false) || f0 not in ("alpha") || !(f1 != true)); $a0_0 : count() )
    T3(f0 <= "ab", f0 < "alpha", $b0_1_0 : f1, $b0_1_1 : f1)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T2(f0 == true, f0 == false || f0 != false, $b1_0_0 : f0, f0 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T3("a", $b1_0_0));
    insertLogical(new T3("ab", $b1_0_0));
    modify($p1_0) { setF0(true) }
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T2($b2_0_0 : f0, f0 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T3("ab", $p2_0.isF0()));
    $p2_0.setF0(true);
    update($p2_0);
end
name: fz_42_9324
